pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh (lines 19-124) creates company and opportunity records. seed_crm.py does not create Office Furniture task data. Contact created by agent during task execution.
Phone number uses 555-0xxx pattern which is reserved by NANP for fictional/example use (RFC 2811, commonly used in TV/movies)
Email domain 'geminifurniture.example.com' uses .example.com which is reserved for examples per RFC 2606

privileged_info_summary: This task operates on fully synthetic data created via setup_task.sh. The company 'Gemini Furniture' is created via XML-RPC calls with example details (address: 317 Fairchild Dr, Mountain View, CA 94043; phone: +1 650-555-0100; website: geminifurniture.example.com). The opportunity 'Office Furniture Bulk Order' is created with expected_revenue=45000.0 and probability=40.0. The contact 'Patricia Williams' must be created by the agent during task execution with email 'p.williams@geminifurniture.example.com', phone '+1 555-0192' (fictitious pattern), and job position 'Procurement Manager'. All values in the metadata are correct specifications for the task. No real-world data sources or databases are used.
